name: Magic Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into strips
salt and freshly ground pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, brown the chicken breasts in the oil.
2. Remove the chicken when it is done and fry off the seasonings: onion, bell pepper, shallots, garlic, and parsley until the onions are clear.
3. Add the entire mixture to a large casserole dish. Include the mushrooms and peas.
4. Fold in the cream of chicken soup.
5. Top with crushed crackers.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
OPTIONS:
1. Put the entire recipe into a pie shell and use either the cracker topping or another pie shell as the top crust.
2. Use individual 6-inch tart shells to make several individual pot pies.
3. Add other vegetables to this mixture, steaming them first if necessary. Try carrots, broccoli, corn, cauliflower, potatoes, or leftover cooked veggies.
4. Use leftover cooked chicken or holiday turkey. Freeze the resulting potpies for future meals.
5. Serve over rice or bake with cooked pasta.
